languages.text: {n}Километры территории Заркова превратились в пепелище или отравленные компостные кучи. Однако усмирители мира знают — рано или поздно на месте ксеноереси вознесутся к небесам хаб-блоки и статуи, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}мануфакторумы{/g} и тренировочные плацы. Плоть должна быть изувечена, чтобы получить священные аугменты. То же самое касается и планеты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Километры территории Заркова превратились в пепелище или отравленные компостные кучи. Однако усмирители мира знают — рано или поздно на месте ксеноереси вознесутся к небесам хаб-блоки и статуи, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}мануфакторумы{/g} и тренировочные плацы. Плоть должна быть изувечена, чтобы получить священные аугменты. Тоже самое касается и планеты.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Километры территории Заркова превратились в пепелище или отравленные компостные кучи. Плоть должна быть изувечена, чтобы получить священные аугменты. То же самое касается и планеты.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコフの広大な領土は灰や毒の肥料の山に変わってしまった。しかし、この世界の征服者たちは、ゼノヘレシーはやがてハブブロックや像、製造所や訓練場へと置き換えられることを知っている。肉は聖なる増幅を受ける前に切除される。同じ原則が惑星にも当てはまる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, manufactorums and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの広大な領土は灰や毒の肥料の山に変わってしまった。しかし、この世界の征服者たちは、 xenoheresy はやがてハブブロックや像、製造所や訓練場へと置き換えられることを知っている。肉は聖なる増幅を受ける前に切除される。同じ原則が惑星にも当てはまる。

languages.text: {n}Vastas regiones del territorio de Zarkov se han convertido en ceniza o compost tóxico. Sin embargo, los destructores de este mundo saben que, pronto, la xenoherejía se verá reemplazada por bloques comunitarios y estatuas, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} y campos de entrenamiento. Es necesario extirpar la carne antes de otorgarle aumentos sagrados, y lo mismo se aplica a los planetas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vastas regiones del territorio de Zarkov se han convertido en ceniza o compost tóxico. Sin embargo, los destructores de este mundo saben que, pronto, la xenoherejía se verá reemplazada por bloques comunitarios y estatuas, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} y campos de entrenamiento. Es necesario extirpar la carne antes de otorgarle aumentos sagrados, y lo mismo se aplica a los planetas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}扎尔科夫的广袤土地化作了焦土与毒壤。然而，征服者们深知，异形造物的残迹很快将被街区、雕像、制造{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}工厂{/g}与训练场所取代。欲进行神圣植入物改造，就必须先行去除苦弱血肉——行星亦遵循此理。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}扎尔科夫的广袤土地化作了焦土与毒壤。然而，征服者们深知，异形造物的残迹很快将被街区、雕像、制造{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}工厂{/g}与训练场所取代。欲进行神圣植入物改造，就必须先行去除苦弱血肉——行星亦遵循此理。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Beträchtliche Teile von Zarkov wurden in Asche oder vergiftete Komposthaufen verwandelt. Allerdings wissen die Zerstörer dieser Welt, dass die Xeno-Ketzerei schon bald Statuen, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}Manufactorien{/g} und Übungsplätzen weichen wird. Fleisch muss vor dem Erhalt heiliger Augmentationen trainiert werden. Dasselbe Prinzip gilt auch für Planeten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. However, the vanquishers of this world know that, before long, xenoheresy will be replaced by hub-blocks and statues, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} and training grounds. Flesh must be excised before it can receive sacred augments. The same principle applies to planets.{/n}

Fleisch muss vor dem Erhalt heiliger Augmentationen trainiert werden. Dasselbe Prinzip gilt auch für Planeten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkov topraklarının geniş alanları küle veya zehirli gübre yığınlarına dönüştürüldü. Ancak bu dünyanın fatihleri biliyor ki çok geçmeden zeno kâfirliğinin yerini yaşam blokları ve heykeller, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}üretimhaneler{/g} ve eğitim alanları alacak. Kutsal ogmentleri alabilmesi için önce etin kesilip atılması gerekir. Aynı ilke, gezegenler için de geçerlidir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vast swathes of Zarkov's territory have been turned into ash or poisoned compost heaps. traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkov topraklarının geniş alanları küle veya zehirli gübre yığınlarına dönüştürüldü. Ancak bu dünyanın fatihleri biliyor ki çok geçmeden zeno kâfirliğinin yerini yaşam blokları ve heykeller, {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}üretimhaneler{/g} ve eğitim alanları alacak. Kutsal ogmentleri alabilmesi için önce etin kesilip atılması gerekir. Aynı ilke, gezegenler için de geçerlidir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De vastes portions du territoire zarkovien furent transformées en amas de cendres ou de compost toxique. Cependant, les vainqueurs de ce monde savaient que, tôt ou tard, la xénohérésie laisserait la place aux blocs d'habitations et aux statues, aux {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorums{/g} et aux terrains d'entraînement. Avant de recevoir les augmentations sacrées, la chair doit être excisée. Le même principe s'applique aux planètes.{/n}
